title: INVOKE_RESULT Message
description: RCAN message type 12. Sent by the robot runtime in response to an INVOKE message (§19). Carries the outcome of the skill execution, correlated via the reply_to field back to the original INVOKE msg_id.

message_type.description: Identifies this as an INVOKE_RESULT message.

ruri.description: RURI of the robot runtime that executed the skill.

reply_to.description: Must match the msg_id of the originating INVOKE message.

status.description: Outcome of the skill execution. 'not_found' means the skill name was not registered on this runtime.

result.description: Skill-specific output. Present when status is 'success'. Schema varies by skill.

error.description: Human-readable error message. Present when status is 'error', 'timeout', or 'not_found'.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds elapsed from when the runtime began executing the skill until this result was produced.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the INVOKE_RESULT was sent.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this message envelope.
